channel.title: Retrieval on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Retrieval on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Microsoft Foundry IQ
item.description:
Microsoft Foundry IQ is now generally available. It provides a managed knowledge layer for grounding agents in enterprise data, with connectors to sources such as SharePoint, OneLake, and Azure Blob.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: commandline: Grounding at scale: Engineering the retrieval system for the agentic web
item.description:
Microsoft introduced Web IQ, a new grounding system for the agentic web. The note is brief and does not include implementation details or feature specifics.

  • Source: Microsoft Command Line Blog

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Agentic Retrieval Toolkit for Azure Cosmos DB
item.description:
Azure Cosmos DB now has a public preview of the Agentic Retrieval Toolkit. It is aimed at building advanced RAG applications for GraphRAG-style and multi-hop reasoning use cases.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: ai: Foundry IQ: Build smarter agents faster with unified knowledge and serverless retrieval
item.description:
Foundry IQ is presented as a way to ground agents in unified enterprise knowledge using serverless retrieval. The post emphasizes improved agentic retrieval quality and production-ready security.

  • Source: Microsoft AI Foundry Blog
